response.overview: According to WHO close to 800 000 people die due to suicide every year. So what happens when there is a lock on the world. A world you already fought so hard to stay in. What happens when you are forced to be in that one place you feel the most unsafe. What happens when the help you desperately needed, the ones you needed, the places you needed are "no longer" there - And it lasts and it lasts. What happens? 800 001 happens and more.
